class.name: ResonanceListener
class.brief_description: Audio listener for Nexus Resonance. Attach to a Camera3D to drive listener position and orientation.
class.description: Reports listener transform to ResonanceServer each frame. On Windows, pathing is protected by an SEH safety net: if the listener flies through walls (e.g. ghost games, noclip), crashes are caught and pathing skips that frame. No need to set [member listener_valid] for such games. Set [member listener_valid] to false only when you explicitly want to disable pathing (e.g. debug camera in geometry) to save CPU.

members.member: When true, path validation runs. When false, pathing is skipped entirely (saves CPU). On Windows, pathing is also crash-protected when listener is unreachable—ghost games work without changing this.
